description: Real-time Quran recitation recognition on smart glasses — translation + transliteration.

permissions.description: Listen to live recitation for verse matching (glasses mic via Mentra)

settings.label: Mode
settings.description: Taraweeh = follow imam with timer. Practice = snap to each verse you hear.

settings.label: Surah hint (0 = auto)
settings.description: Optional 1–114 to speed up first lock. 0 = detect any surah.

settings.label: Show transliteration
settings.description: Show Latin transliteration under the translation on glasses.

settings.label: Key mode
settings.description: Shared = server keys. BYOK = paste your own Groq or OpenAI key below.

settings.label: Groq API key
settings.description: Get a free key at console.groq.com — paste gsk_… here for BYOK.

settings.label: OpenAI API key (optional)
settings.description: Optional sk_… if you prefer OpenAI Whisper instead of Groq.
